subcodes.first_line: Take thou God as thy Reckoner, then as thy Guardian, then as thy Protector. Verily God shall suffice thee against all else, and whoso findeth intimacy with Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاتخذ الله لنفسک حسیبا ثم وکیلا ثم کفیلا و ان الله یکفیک عن دونه و من آنس به
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @spiritual transformation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
